config.script:
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#define TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA #tmp_prod_hierarchy
class CProdHierarchy
private bDisposed
private sub class_initialize() bDisposed = false
#ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: create table TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA " #endif dim strSQL strSQL = "create table TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA " + vbCrLf +_ "(" + vbCrLf +_ "tmp_group_idobj integer not null," + vbCrLf +_ ")" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
#comment 'index spowalnia #comment 'w tym przypadku trans_.execsql "create index TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA##1 on TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA## (tmp_group_idobj)" #comment #ifdef NOT_NOW
create procedure #n5grupaproduktow_subtree(@idroot integer) as declare @idobj integer declare @sub_cur cursor set @sub_cur = cursor fast_forward for select idobj from n5grupaproduktow where pGrupaNadrzedna=@idroot insert into #tmp_prod_hierarchy values(@idroot) open @sub_cur fetch next from @sub_cur into @idobj while @@fetch_status = 0 begin exec #n5grupaproduktow_subtree @idobj fetch next from @sub_cur into @idobj end close @sub_cur deallocate @sub_cur #endif
trans_.execsql _ "create procedure #n5grupaproduktow_subtree(@idroot integer)"+ vbCrLf +_ "as"+ vbCrLf +_ "declare @idobj integer"+ vbCrLf +_ "declare @sub_cur cursor"+ vbCrLf +_ "set @sub_cur = cursor fast_forward for select idobj from n5grupaproduktow where pGrupaNadrzedna=@idroot"+ vbCrLf +_ "insert into TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA values(@idroot)"+ vbCrLf +_ "open @sub_cur"+ vbCrLf +_ "fetch next from @sub_cur into @idobj"+ vbCrLf +_ "while @@fetch_status = 0"+ vbCrLf +_ "begin"+ vbCrLf +_ "exec #n5grupaproduktow_subtree @idobj"+ vbCrLf +_ "fetch next from @sub_cur into @idobj"+ vbCrLf +_ "end"+ vbCrLf +_ "close @sub_cur"+ vbCrLf +_ "deallocate @sub_cur"+ vbCrLf
end sub
public sub fill_on_prodgrupa_param (byval param) #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: fill table TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA " trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "DEBUG: " + param.get_where_part(trans_) #endif dim strSQL : strSQL = "select idobj from n5grupaproduktow"
if param.get_where_part(trans_) = "(strNazwa is not null)" then strSQL = strSQL + " where " + "(pGrupaNadrzedna=0)" else if param.get_where_part(trans_) <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + " where " + param.get_where_part(trans_) end if end if
dim rs:set rs = trans_.createadors(strSQL) do while not rs.eof trans_.execsql "exec #n5grupaproduktow_subtree " + cstr(rs("idobj")) rs.movenext loop end sub
public sub fill_on_grupa_idobj(byval idGrupa) trans_.execsql "exec #n5grupaproduktow_subtree " + cstr(idGrupa) end sub
public sub manual_done() if not bDisposed then bDisposed = true
#ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1002, 0 , "DEBUG: drop table TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA " #endif dim strSQL strSQL = "if exists (select * from tempdb..sysobjects where name like 'TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA##%') drop table TMP_PRODUKTY_HIERARCHIA" + vbCrLf trans_.execsql strSQL
trans_.execsql _ "if exists (select * from tempdb..sysobjects where name like '#n5grupaproduktow_subtree%') drop procedure #n5grupaproduktow_subtree" + vbCrLf
end if end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK manual_done() end sub
end class
function new_prod_hierarchy set new_prod_hierarchy = new CProdHierarchy end function
